accurate-laser-e150.overview: The Accurate Laser E150 is a high-speed CO2 laser cutting and engraving machine designed for large-format applications. Ideal for signage, decorative panels, acrylic letters, and woodcraft, it delivers consistent, accurate results with efficiency and reliability. Advanced technology ensures stable operation, fast production, and precise contour cutting with CCD camera guidance.

keyFeatures.title: High-Power CO2 Laser
keyFeatures.description: Delivers sharp, precise engraving and cutting across multiple substrates, including acrylic, wood, leather, and plastics. Ideal for both fine details and large-format projects.

keyFeatures.title: Large Working Area
keyFeatures.description: ~1300 × 2500 mm bed size allows handling of medium-to-large sheets, supporting industrial-scale production without sacrificing precision.

keyFeatures.title: Heavy-Duty Steel Frame
keyFeatures.description: Minimizes vibration, ensures long-term structural stability, and maintains alignment for consistent output during high-speed operation.

keyFeatures.title: CCD Camera Alignment
keyFeatures.description: Built-in camera detects contours and corrects placement, allowing accurate cutouts for irregular shapes and repeatable engraving on complex designs.

keyFeatures.title: Safety Features
keyFeatures.description: Includes protective laser housing, emergency stop, and interlocks to ensure safe operation in commercial environments.

keyFeatures.title: User-Friendly Controller
keyFeatures.description: USB and Wi-Fi connectivity with an intuitive interface compatible with LightBurn and other CNC software, making file transfer and job setup straightforward.

specifications.value: Intelligent Constant Temperature Cooler and Protection System
High Speed DSP Control Stepper Motor High Subdivision Drive
CorelDraw, CAD, AI Files via RD Works Software
Air Pipes, Hose Clamp, Power Cable, Network Cable, Focusing Plates, Key, Dual Air Exhaust Fan, Air Pump (Air compressor not included)

salesInsights.a: The Accurate Laser E150 is a large-format CO2 laser cutting and engraving machine with a 1300×2500mm working bed. It uses a 150W CO2 glass tube laser to cut and engrave acrylic, wood, leather, plastics, and similar substrates. The built-in CCD camera system enables contour detection and precise placement correction, making it suitable for both straight-cut sheet work and complex shaped cutouts on pre-printed or irregular materials.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: For signage and display businesses, the E150's large bed size means fewer material repositions and faster throughput on medium-to-large panels. The CCD camera alignment eliminates manual measuring for complex contour cuts, reducing operator time and error. LightBurn and RDWorks compatibility means most operators are immediately familiar with the workflow, minimising training time.

The CCD camera alignment system is the standout differentiator — it allows the machine to automatically detect printed outlines and cut precisely around them, which is critical for shaped acrylic letters, branded decorative panels, and custom gift items. Combined with the 150W power output and heavy-duty steel frame, it offers a reliable high-production platform well suited to commercial signage and fabrication workshops.

accurate-laser-e300.overview: The Accurate Laser E300 is an advanced CO2 laser system designed for industrial-scale engraving and cutting. With higher power output than the E150, it delivers faster production, larger-format capability, and precise performance on a wide range of materials, including acrylic, wood, leather, plastics, and metal-coated surfaces. Its robust frame, precision motion, and automated features make it ideal for high-volume manufacturing, signage, and decorative applications.

keyFeatures.title: High-Power CO2 Laser (300W Class)
keyFeatures.description: Ideal for thick materials and high-speed cutting/engraving; ensures sharp, detailed results even on dense substrates.

keyFeatures.title: Extra-Large Working Area
keyFeatures.description: Handles oversized sheets up to ~1500 × 3000 mm, supporting large-format signage, panels, and industrial parts.

keyFeatures.title: Heavy-Duty Steel Frame
keyFeatures.description: Vibration-free, welded construction for structural stability and long-term mechanical precision.

keyFeatures.title: User-Friendly Controller & Connectivity
keyFeatures.description: Wi-Fi, USB, and Ethernet interfaces with compatibility for LightBurn, RDWorks, and other CNC software; intuitive touchscreen operation.

keyFeatures.title: Low Maintenance & Long Life
keyFeatures.description: High-quality components and modular design reduce downtime and simplify maintenance.

keyFeatures.title: Customizable Workflows & Multi-Step Projects
keyFeatures.description: Layer-based cutting and engraving, variable laser power, and advanced job scheduling for complex or repeatable production.

keyFeatures.title: Energy-Efficient Operation
keyFeatures.description: Optimized laser power usage and motion control for lower energy consumption and eco-friendly production.

salesInsights.a: The Accurate Laser E300 is the high-power evolution of the E150, using a 300W CO2 dual tube laser to cut and engrave at industrial speed. It operates on the same 1300×2500mm bed with the same CCD camera contour system but is capable of cutting significantly thicker materials in fewer passes, and at higher throughput speeds. Its layer-based job scheduling and multi-step workflow support make it suited for complex production environments.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: Customers who have outgrown the E150's throughput find the E300 doubles effective cutting speed on thick acrylic and dense wood without compromising edge quality. Ethernet connectivity and multi-software compatibility (LightBurn, RDWorks) integrate easily into existing production setups. The modular design means maintenance can be performed without extended downtime, which is critical in high-volume environments.

The 300W dual-tube configuration is the primary differentiator — it enables cutting of metal-coated surfaces and very dense substrates that a standard 150W machine cannot handle cleanly. The advanced job scheduling with variable laser power per layer allows a single complex file to execute multiple material treatments (engrave + cut + score) in a fully automated sequence, reducing operator involvement and enabling repeatable batch production.

dlican-dl3200-rp.overview: The Dlican DLI-3200 UV Flatbed Printer delivers powerful, precise, and high-quality printing on materials like glass, wood, metal, and plastic. Using advanced UV technology, it produces vibrant, durable prints that cure instantly while reducing waste and emissions. Perfect for signage, décor, and custom products, it combines speed, quality, and sustainability in one smart machine.

keyFeatures.title: Hybrid Printing
keyFeatures.description: Supports both flatbed and roll materials.

keyFeatures.title: UV Curing
keyFeatures.description: Instant drying with durable output.

keyFeatures.title: High Precision
keyFeatures.description: Magnetic linear motor ensures accuracy.

keyFeatures.title: Auto Height Adjustment
keyFeatures.description: Adjusts for various material thickness.

keyFeatures.title: Multi-Material Support
keyFeatures.description: Works with glass, wood, plastic, and more.

salesInsights.a: The Dlican DL3200-RP is a hybrid UV flatbed and roll-to-roll printer designed for large-format industrial printing up to 3200 mm width. It prints directly onto rigid and flexible materials such as glass, panels, vinyl, and lightbox fabric using UV-curable inks that dry instantly under UV light.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: Its hybrid capability eliminates the need for separate machines for rigid and roll media, reducing capital investment and floor space. Instant UV curing allows faster turnaround times, while the magnetic linear motor ensures consistent precision, making it suitable for high-volume production environments.

The combination of flatbed and roll printing in a single system, along with high-speed UV curing and precision linear motor control, makes it highly versatile. It supports a wide material range while maintaining print consistency, positioning it as a flexible solution for diverse commercial printing needs.

dlican-dli-2513.overview: The Dlican DLI-2513 is a versatile UV flatbed printer that delivers bright, detailed, and durable prints on materials like glass, wood, acrylic, and metal. Designed with eco-friendly UV technology, it reduces energy use and waste while maintaining top-quality results. Compact, efficient, and sustainable, it makes professional printing simple.

salesInsights.a: The Dlican DLI-2513 is a compact UV flatbed printer designed for high-quality printing on rigid materials such as glass, wood, acrylic, metal, and plastic, with a working size of 2500 × 1300 mm.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: Its compact footprint allows installation in smaller production spaces while still delivering industrial-grade output. The auto height detection and multi-printhead compatibility enable flexibility across various product types, reducing setup time and increasing operational efficiency.

The ability to support multiple printhead configurations (Ricoh, Epson) combined with extended height printing options (up to 450 mm optional) makes it adaptable for both standard and specialty applications like thick materials and customized products.

jhf-m5300.overview: The JHF M5300 Hybrid UV Printer combines ultra-wide performance with sustainable innovation. Capable of printing on both rigid and flexible materials up to 5 meters wide, it delivers vibrant, high-precision results for signage, decor, and industrial applications. With energy-efficient UV LED curing and reduced ink waste, the M5300 ensures powerful productivity while maintaining an eco-friendly footprint, making it perfect for businesses seeking to print smarter and greener.

salesInsights.a: The JHF M5300 is an ultra-wide hybrid UV printer capable of printing on both rigid and flexible materials up to 5 meters wide, delivering high-speed and high-precision output for industrial-scale applications.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: With speeds up to 400 m²/h and multi-roll capability, it significantly increases production throughput for large-format jobs such as billboards and signage. UV LED curing reduces energy consumption and operational costs while maintaining durability and quality.

Its maglev-driven linear motor system ensures vibration-free precision at high speeds, while the ultra-wide 5-meter capacity enables production of oversized graphics in a single pass, reducing seams and improving output quality.

jhf-r9000pro.overview: The JHF R9000 redefines ultra-wide industrial printing with unmatched speed, precision, and intelligent automation. Its dual-row, ten-color output system and 5 m multi-roll capability deliver photo-realistic results with outstanding efficiency. Featuring energy-saving UV LED curing and fully automated, unmanned operation, the R9000 offers superior performance with a sustainable edge, raising productivity and print quality to new heights.

salesInsights.a: The JHF R9000Pro is a high-speed industrial UV roll-to-roll printer with a 5-meter width and multi-roll capability, designed for producing large-format graphics such as banners, vehicle wraps, and exhibition displays.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: Its dual-row printhead configuration and automation features allow continuous, high-volume production with minimal operator intervention. Multi-roll printing enables simultaneous output, significantly increasing productivity.

The intelligent automation system supports near-unmanned operation, while the 10-color output system enhances color accuracy and print quality, making it suitable for premium, photo-realistic applications.

jhf-t3700.overview: The demand for automated, high-quality fabric printing is growing rapidly. Ideal for wide-format applications like soft signage and wall graphics in hotels, museums, offices, and malls, it delivers vibrant, personalized prints with precision and efficiency. Advanced technology ensures consistent color, fast production, and smooth operation, all while supporting eco-friendly, sustainable practices, making it perfect for businesses looking to stay competitive in the evolving signage and interior decoration market.

salesInsights.a: The JHF T3700 is a wide-format textile printer designed for high-speed dye sublimation and direct disperse printing on fabrics, supporting applications like banners, flags, and soft signage.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: It enables businesses to enter or scale textile printing with high efficiency, offering speeds up to 162 m²/h and integrated drying systems that streamline production workflows.

Its dual ink compatibility (dye sublimation and disperse) combined with integrated air and IR drying systems allows flexible production setups and consistent color output across various textile applications.

jhf-v698.overview: The JHF Vista V689 (5meter) Printer delivers precise, high-quality printing on a variety of materials, including wood, metal, glass, and plastics. Equipped with advanced technology, it produces vibrant, durable prints while minimizing waste and environmental impact. Ideal for signage, decor, and custom projects, it blends speed, quality, and sustainability in a single smart solution.

salesInsights.a: The JHF V698 is a 5-meter UV roll-to-roll printer designed for high-quality printing on flexible materials such as PVC banners, PET films, and vinyl.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: It offers a balance between speed and quality, enabling businesses to handle both indoor and outdoor applications efficiently. LED UV curing reduces heat impact, allowing printing on sensitive materials.
Its support for white ink and multi-layer printing, combined with stable material handling systems, enables high-end applications like backlit displays and premium signage.

jhf-venus-10r.overview: The JHF Venus 10R sets a new benchmark in ultra-wide industrial printing with intelligent, high-speed, and precision performance. Equipped with a double-row, ten-color output system and a 5 m multi-roll design, it delivers photo-realistic prints with exceptional efficiency. Featuring fully automated, unmanned operation and energy-saving UV LED curing, the Venus 10R combines productivity, innovation, and eco-friendly technology in one powerful solution.

salesInsights.a: The JHF Venus 10R is a 5-meter ultra-wide UV printer designed for high-speed, high-precision printing on flexible media with multi-roll capability.

salesInsights.q: How does it benefit the customer?
salesInsights.a: It maximizes productivity through simultaneous multi-roll printing and automated workflows, reducing labor costs and increasing output efficiency in large-scale production environments.
Its double-row, 20-head configuration and intelligent automation system allow continuous, high-quality production with minimal supervision, making it ideal for industrial-scale operations.

jhf-venus-33x.overview: The JHF Venus 33X is a 3.2 m ultra-high-end hybrid UV printer designed for both roll and sheet printing. With dual-roll and multi-sheet capability, it delivers exceptional productivity and precision. Featuring intelligent edge detection, automatic media handling, and an energy-efficient German Honle curing system, the Venus 33X combines high performance with eco-friendly operation, empowering businesses to achieve greater efficiency and sustainable growth.

salesInsights.a: Its dual-roll and multi-sheet capabilities increase production flexibility and efficiency, allowing businesses to handle diverse job types without switching machines.

The automatic edge detection and intelligent media handling system optimize layout and reduce material waste, while multi-layer printing supports advanced applications like textured and white ink designs.

Its intelligent, easy-to-use system makes printing faster, more efficient, and eco-friendly.

jhf-v398.overview: The JHF V398 is a high-speed, 3.2 m wide-format roll-to-roll UV printer that sets a new benchmark for UV inkjet performance. It combines exceptional print quality for POP displays with the speed and reliability needed for large indoor and outdoor billboards. Designed for efficiency and versatility, the V398 supports a wide range of commercial applications from exhibition graphics and digital textiles to billboard signage. With energy-saving UV curing technology and reduced ink waste, it delivers outstanding results while maintaining eco-friendly operation.
